chapter_title.en: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification

text: 322 - وَقَالَ مُوسَى بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «تَمَشَّطُوا بِالْعَاجِ فَإِنَّهُ يَذْهَبُ بِالْوَبَاءِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.322 - Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as) said:
"Comb your hair with combs made of ivory, for it removes ailments."
